name_en: 【LV x TM VANITY CHAIN POUCH Bag】M13662 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
name_cn:
【LV x TM VANITY CHAIN POUCH Bag】M13662 White Multicolore (Takashi Murakami)
This Vanity Pouch SjCc bag is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami re-edition series, reinterpreting the brand's classic Monogram pattern with the artist's vivid tones. The coated canvas features calfskin trim, a zip closure, a detachable chain, and a LV-engraved lock for added metallic shine.
Size: 11.5 x 6.5 x 19 cm
